boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Milestone IDs and releases distinguish invoices per policy
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in source distinction
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current sources close boundary before release

final_answer: Sources confirm M-4/R4 is distinct from paid M-3/R3 by milestone ID, release, and register. Policy STD-VAN-076-P is satisfied. Action boundary closed. Release may proceed.
